reviews.review_description: I saw videos about this and downloaded it. It said update or check connection. My internet was fine and no updates were available so i thought my internet was so bad it took that long to process my speed. Got my internet checked out and it was fine. I tried playing again but still cannot connect.

reviews.review_title: A Cool game but with problems
reviews.review_description:
It's a good game all in all it's just that there's barely any voice chat regulations like I've gone it to lobbys and every one is saying the N word and I hope the devs fix it.

Also I know the devs are trying to fix this problem because alot of people are complaining about it. but its very annoying that the average waiting time to be killer is over an hour and then there's a chance that you get kicked out of the lobby because there weren't enough people and then have to wait another hour to get into a match

Really nice game and I can see how much work they have put in to this the only problem is when the game glitches when you come back from a match and it auto turns you into mathmatiation and you can't lock anything. Also when you join a match and your stuck waiting forever in the black screen where it says 'waiting for players". But this only happens rarely so it's still a good game and I definitely recommend!

Quite literally the reason why vr is running on fumes now is because of low effort cheap games like this that have NO inspiration NO soul and s#ity players. Instead of making an actual game people decide to make games like this. Im honestly surprised that nobody has made an ACTUAL long term game on vr because if people DID make ACTUAL games for vr they would make WAYYY more money. (JUST DON'T PLAY THIS GAME, SUPPORTING GAMES LIKE THIS WILL EVENTUALLY DRIVE VR DOWN INTO THE DIRT.)

Dude I swear when playing the game that there are so many people saying the N-Word, harassing me, and just saying I suck for winning, if you are sensitive, DON'T PLAY THIS GAME! Also people have been bragging, making people cry, and more. This game is the worst, maybe the worst ever

reviews.review_title: W w w w w w w w w w w w w w w
reviews.review_description: But one problem the game has so much targeting so I have an idea after the killer puts a survivor in a cage once they escape the cage the killer can not hit them for one and a half minutes and when there is thirty seconds left of the round the sun will set and the round will be over also can the round be 15 minutes not 12 have a blessed day and Jesus loves you ✝️

Honestly well done! The mechanics are sound, there’s a lot of variety in the survivors and especially killers, good amount of maps, etc. but honestly, this game falls flat in one of the most important areas of a game like this. Private matches/Playing with your friends. Private matches just don’t exist, and it’s actually impossible to guarantee you won’t have someone else in your match or not. You can join a team, but then you can’t even play as killer! I’ve never played as killer in this game solely because it locks you out if your in a team, which is really sad. It’d be nice if you could add a way to where all 4 of my friends could be together and one of us could actually be the killer. Other than that, great job! Looking forward to more updates!

I like the game so much but the killers keep targeting me when I run away with the other survivors then I got hit by the killer. Theres bunch of weird 13 year olds doing inappropriate stuff to 10 year olds in every server. And theres alot of kids saying the n word. Can you please change the price of Magician. She/He is very impossible to buy. 350 might be hard and im trying my best

This game is so good that I play it everyday non-stop That's how good it is bro but I do want the developers to take off the matchmaking if they did take off the matchmaking it would have been even funner oh and I have an idea for a new killer it should be the mummy where it grabs it's like toilet paper thing and throws it at the survivors and when the survivors get caught they get wrapped around the toilet paper for 20 seconds and won't be able to move

I like the game good concept but I don't like how they changed it so you need to win to become killer I much prefer the version where you just need to play 3 full rounds no matter if you win or lose and it makes it consistent when you get to be killer but having it so you need to win makes it inconsistent because I haven't gotten killer in 50 games yet I was paired with good players for majority of this. Also if you escape it doesn't count as a win which is dumb you need 3 people to escape to win which is hard to achieve even with good players.

reviews.review_title: My absolute favorite game of all time
reviews.review_description: Dead by daylight in Vr with gorilla tag movement. Easily my favorite game on Vr HIGHLY RECOMMEND. The game is mostly balanced with a few things here and there being a little out of place. And there are bugs but that’s just part of having a game. I get it might not be for some but this game is a MUST PLAY

first of all the hardest overpowered the seekers some are completely useless. The community is very rude for some reason and also the updates takes so long to load. It says I don’t have good Internet but anyway, I have perfect Internet 
￼￼

I will say, though the chases are normally fun and being the killer is really hard, but fun ￼

Police man is way to over powered I’ll be walking as killer and get shot more times in chase than king Julius Caesar got stabbed (23 times btw) every SINGLE CHASE. OH AND DONT GET ME MENTIONED ON ROOFTOP IS ABSOLUTELY HORRIBLE HOW YALL DESIGNED IT
All police players will pick it and torture the killer

reviews.review_title: It’s fun but everyone is so toxic
reviews.review_description: The game is vary fun but everyone in the game vary toxic and saying a lot of bad words and the game doesn’t even do anything they don’t ban they don’t do anything so I think I should quit so developers you need to actually start ban people. It’s so annoying. ￼

It’s just a really fun game and there’s like a pretty balanced and like every time there’s a bug they look almost instantly fix it and they always listen to our community and it’s just been such a good game and it’s so easy to just play with your friends are there games it’s like so annoying trying to invite them and actually get into a game with them but this is life so much easier I’m just so much fun￼

reviews.review_title: Rage baiting new players simulator slop
reviews.review_description: I whould give this negative stars if I could. It’s so survivor based, it makes a cutscene that last 1000 hours after hitting someone, the players have a unrealistic amount of flashlights, and the toxic rage baiters make me want to jump off the nearest bridge, it’s  literally just a endless cycle of torment, I can even say that the gorilla tag community is better. And that’s really saying something, I’m fully convinced that the developers are doing nothing but just sitting on their chairs while meanwhile some kid is getting bullied because they don’t even know how to put someone in a cage. Say skill issue all you want but I’m telling you, this.game.is.straight.up.buns

This game is overall really good due to the unnecessary money sounding, this game actually feels good to play without spending money. But the movement is slow but because of the movement speed upgrades, it evens stuff out. Overall good game and would recommend for players looking for a challenge!

Now this game used to be a good game but like most vr games it eventually gets popular and starts getting ruined I can't play one match without being called the N-word 10 times per minute do not play this game if you are sensitive I would not recommend you this game you will get bullied by this trashy community for no reason it's also insanely survivor sided as killer when you hit something it literally plays a 5 second animation and at this point you may as well just remove voice chat and I would start playing it again I also keep getting bullied just for getting slightly mad when I lose and don't even get me starting on this games moderation somebody will say a cuss word thirty times and not get punished in the slightest this game genuinely used to be a great game before it got insanely popular I heard some sixteen year old threatening to dox a little kid because he lost and if your killer every generator will be done in the blink of an eye not even giving you a good chance genuinely trash game now😐

Ok I gotta say, the movement was hard to get used to at first, but now i know it just adds another level to the stress of being chased! I love this game, i’ll keep it short, PLEASE improve the bots and maybe make cages have better timers, like 30s 20s like that. Also make it so killers cant CAMP CAGE WITH THE BUTCHER ABILITY!! SO BAD BRO! Other than that, AMAZING GAME and have a nice day. 😁😁😁

This game is good to play with friends. But some issues are getting gold to buy stuff, but on the other hand we have something called souls that you can buy stuff but it’s harder but in general this game is awesome

I would give it 5 if it wasn't so killer sided,

Gangster Needs nerf, literal aimbot
Spider needs buff or a rework
Stalker needs nerf on his blind ability and it'll be good
 
These are the smallest reasons why I gave it 1 star

And there is no big reason
One of the best games I've played yet it is really good on my opinion the killers and the walki talki is really good

It's kinda glitchy sometimes the killer can one shot you even if you're fully healed and the pallets (at least in my experience) don't work to stun the killer 

And also the speed advantage in my opinion is too much because I understand the survivors being slower but it's a large difference 

Also the fact that the killer gets reusable buffs while the survivors have to sit in one spot to renew their buff and they're not even guaranteed what they need 

And I feel like they should add a way to leave the game because sometimes I'll get stuck with bot teammates or bad teammates and you're stuck unless you close the app
 
Also the automatic in queue gets annoying when you're trying to do stuff or you're afk because it'll just put you in a game and it's a uselessly annoying feature.
it has been a long time coming for the people who want the most out for them and their family and friends give them money to buy bundles

reviews.review_title: W Game, 100% worth a try because its fre
reviews.review_description: Most people in this game are funny ash, In this game when your killer it makes your voice deeper and in one of my recent games I had a killer that whenever he was chssing someone he would scream into the mic so all you heard chasing you was a deep voiced scream ever so fast catching up to you. I was skeptical about this game at first but it definently grew on me. Smart choice on the devs for making the game free. Oh yeah and its nice the survivors actually start out with an item based on what survivor you have equipped unlike dbd where every survivor is technically the same.
